## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role involves overseeing content pipelines, client management, and optimizing AI-driven workflows](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [GrowthX uses proprietary tool Atlas for content creation, requiring technical aptitude and adaptability](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [Key challenges: improving brief generation and closing quality gaps in pipeline outputs](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Ideal candidate balances content expertise with technical skills to enhance AI-driven processes](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Expectations

  - [Technical Managing Editor oversees content pipelines and client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Responsibilities include:](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
      - [Clearing blockers for Content Managers (CMs)](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
      - [Architecting content pipelines (not building)](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
      - [Understanding client goals and translating to actionable strategies](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
      - [Interfacing with clients on tactical level](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
      - [Reporting on content performance](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Need for both editorial expertise and technical understanding of AI/LLM workflows](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [Use of proprietary tool Atlas for content pipeline management](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [Key components:](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
      - [Client dashboard with scoring and traffic metrics](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [Knowledge base for client artifacts (e.g., writing guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
      - [Automated pipeline for content creation (topic → assignment → research → outline → draft → final article)](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Human-in-the-loop approach at each stage for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [Goal: Scalable, high-quality content production (20-40 pieces/week across multiple clients)](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)

### Current Challenges and Areas for Improvement

  - [Brief and assignment generation:](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
      - [Time-consuming process for CMs](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
      - [Need for better automated brief generation aligned with client expectations](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Closing quality gaps in pipeline outputs:](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
      - [Current outputs often 70-80% off target](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
      - [Need to improve context engineering and prompts to reduce manual editing](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Balancing client-specific requirements with scalable processes](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)

### Technical Skills and Adaptability

  - [Experience with LLMs, prompt engineering, and context engineering crucial](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Ability to prototype solutions (e.g., using Claude projects) and articulate improvements to engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [Comfort with changing product landscape and elastic workloads in startup environment](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2152.0)

### Company Culture and Work Environment

  - [Transparent communication across teams](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
  - [Documentation-heavy for self-learning](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
  - [Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI content creation techniques](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2252.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Candidate to potentially speak with other team members (e.g., Andy)](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2325.0)
  - [Hiring team to evaluate fit based on technical skills and adaptability to dynamic environment](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2152.0)
  - [Further discussions on specific experiences relevant to role challenges](https://fathom.video/share/zN4JUgNW_qSs3V8g4Krgy7cwoydsUsnZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
